Title: Verify DashboardActivity loads correctly
Preconditions: Application is launched.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Verify DashboardActivity is displayed.
Expected Result: DashboardActivity should be loaded without any errors.

Title: Verify MainActivity loads correctly
Preconditions: Application is launched.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Verify MainActivity is displayed.
Expected Result: MainActivity should be loaded without any errors.

Title: Verify SignInActivity loads correctly
Preconditions: Application is launched.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Tap on the "Sign In" option.
3. Verify SignInActivity is displayed.
Expected Result: SignInActivity should be loaded without any errors.

Title: Verify UserListActivity loads correctly
Preconditions: Application is launched.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Tap on the "User List" option.
3. Verify UserListActivity is displayed.
Expected Result: UserListActivity should be loaded without any errors.

Title: Verify weather functionality works as expected
Preconditions: Application is launched and user is signed in.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Tap on the "Weather" button.
3. Enter a valid location name.
4. Verify local weather is displayed.
5. Tap on the magnifying glass icon.
6. Enter another valid location name.
7. Verify weather for the new location is displayed.
Expected Result: Local and new weather should be displayed correctly.

Title: Verify weather functionality fails with invalid input
Preconditions: Application is launched and user is signed in.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Tap on the "Weather" button.
3. Enter an invalid location name.
4. Verify error message is displayed.
Expected Result: Error message should be displayed indicating invalid input.

Title: Verify trekking functionality works as expected
Preconditions: Application is launched and user is signed in.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Tap on the "Trekking" button.
3. Select a valid province.
4. Verify route list for the selected province is displayed.
5. Tap on a route in the list.
6. Verify the selected route is processed.
Expected Result: Route list and selected route should be displayed correctly.

Title: Verify trekking functionality fails with invalid input
Preconditions: Application is launched and user is signed in.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Tap on the "Trekking" button.
3. Select an invalid province.
4. Verify error message is displayed.
Expected Result: Error message should be displayed indicating invalid input.

Title: Verify health functionality works as expected
Preconditions: Application is launched and user is signed in.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Tap on the "Health" button.
3. Verify the list of past training data is displayed.
Expected Result: List of past training data should be displayed correctly.

Title: Verify health functionality fails with no data available
Preconditions: Application is launched and user is signed in.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Tap on the "Health" button.
3. Verify no data is displayed.
Expected Result: No data should be displayed if none is available.

Title: Verify successful login
Preconditions: Application is launched.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Tap on the "Sign In" option.
3. Enter a valid username and password.
4. Tap on the "Sign In" button.
5. Verify user is redirected to MainActivity.
Expected Result: User should be successfully logged in and redirected to MainActivity.

Title: Verify failed login due to invalid credentials
Preconditions: Application is launched.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Tap on the "Sign In" option.
3. Enter an invalid username and password.
4. Tap on the "Sign In" button.
5. Verify error message is displayed.
Expected Result: Error message should be displayed indicating invalid credentials.

Title: Verify logout functionality
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Tap on the "Sign In" option.
3. Enter a valid username and password.
4. Tap on the "Sign In" button.
5. Tap on the "Sign Out" button.
6. Verify user is redirected to SignInActivity.
Expected Result: User should be logged out and redirected to SignInActivity.

Title: Verify user list display
Preconditions: Application is launched and user is signed in.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Tap on the "User List" option.
3. Verify the list of users is displayed.
Expected Result: List of users should be displayed correctly.

Title: Verify empty user list display
Preconditions: Application is launched and user is signed in.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Tap on the "User List" option.
3. Verify no user list is displayed.
Expected Result: No user list should be displayed if none is available.

Title: Verify navigation between activities
Preconditions: Application is launched.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Verify navigation from MainActivity to SignInActivity.
3. Verify navigation from MainActivity to UserListActivity.
Expected Result: Navigation between activities should work as expected.

Title: Verify navigation failure
Preconditions: Application is launched.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Attempt to navigate from MainActivity to a non-existent activity.
Expected Result: Navigation should fail and an appropriate error message should be displayed.
